name: Folder Studio
description: Build, run, troubleshoot, or extend a Folder Studio macOS menu bar app that reads folder context, suggests engravings, colors folders, previews Finder-style skins, and applies custom icons. Use when Codex needs to work on a workspace containing `FolderStudioApp`, keep Folder Studio separate from Cursor Studio, regenerate the Xcode project, or validate the `FolderStudio` scheme and tests.
short_description: Context-aware Finder folder skins and icon workflows
audience: Mac users who want Finder folders to be easier to recognize
Builders shipping compact menu-bar utilities with icon preview and apply flows
Teams keeping Folder Studio separate from cursor-pack generation work
detail_lines: Reads local folder context and keeps the category, content counts, engraving, badge, palette, and apply/reset state visible in a compact menu-bar panel.
Owns Finder-style preview and custom folder-icon apply flows while keeping cursor-pack planning in Cursor Studio.
Uses explicit local workspace and folder inputs, with no hidden network calls or broad persistence requirements.
